data.title: Crunch Fitness to open $5M, 40K sq-ft gym in Madera, CA in Spring 2026.
data.description: In Madera, California, Crunch Fitness is set to launch Crunch Madera in Spring 2026. The cutting-edge fitness center will span 40,000 square feet and has incurred a cost of $5 million. Under the management of franchisee Fitness..., this new facility promises top-notch amenities and services for fitness enthusiasts in the area.

data.title: Willis Lease Finance Corp prices $392.9M in Fixed Rate Notes with $337.4M in Series A Notes and $55.5M in Series B Notes.
data.description: Willis Lease Finance Corporation, a leading lessor of commercial aircraft engines and global aviation services provider, announced through its subsidiary, Willis Engine Structured Trust IX, the pricing of $337.4 million in Series A Fixed Rate Notes and $55.5 million in Series B Fixed Rate Notes, totaling $392.9 million. The Notes will be secured by WEST's interests in a portfolio of 47 aircraft engines and two airframes, acquired from WLFC or its subsidiaries. The closing date for this transaction is set for December 23, 2025, as disclosed on December 11, 2025, in Coconut Creek, Florida.

data.title: Match Perfumes launches in the U.S. with 40-scent collection, celebrity guests & influencers gathered at NY launch party.
data.description: A vibrant launch event in New York gathered notable guests and influencers to unveil Match Perfumes' new collection of 40 scents. The event took place on December 11, 2025, showcasing the brand's mission to bridge the quality and affordability divide in the fragrance market.

data.title: Rio2 to file prospectus for "Bought Deal" equity financing. #Rio2 #equityfinancing #prospectus #filing
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, showcasing a significant improvement compared to the previous month. The number of new jobs created in the past month stands at 250,000, exceeding economists' expectations by a wide margin. This surge in job creation has positively impacted various sectors, with the service industry seeing the most substantial growth. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 3.2% in the same time frame, highlighting a boost in worker earnings. The robust job market has instilled confidence in consumers, leading to an uptick in consumer spending across the board. Overall, these statistics paint a promising picture of economic growth and stability in the country.

data.title: Crypto entrepreneur Do Kwon, creator of Luna and TerraUSD, sentenced to 15 years for causing the 2022 crash after pleading guilty to fraud.
data.description: Renowned crypto designer Do Kwon, creator of the cryptocurrencies Luna and TerraUSD, both of which experienced significant declines in 2022, has admitted guilt to charges of fraud.

data.title: Arcosa, Inc. declared a $0.05 quarterly dividend per share on its common stock, payable on Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: Dallas-based company Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE: ACA) recently shared that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share on its $0.01 par value common stock. This dividend will be paid out on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 15, 2026. Arcosa is known for offering infrastructure-related products and solutions. With its headquarters in Texas, Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE: ACA) is focused on providing essential infrastructure support.

data.title: Finance of America partners with Blue Owl for $2.5B to expand home equity lending, targeting retirement market growth.
data.description: Finance of America Companies Inc. and Blue Owl Capital, Inc. have revealed their plans to boost their strategic partnership by expanding a joint initiative with $2.5 billion investment. Finance of America leads in offering modern retirement financing solutions, while Blue Owl is a renowned alternative asset manager. The expanded collaboration aims to drive product innovation and distribution for the rapidly growing retirement sector in the U.S. This partnership will focus on catering to the needs of the aging population and enhancing financial solutions to facilitate a secure retirement.

data.title: Exact Sciences Corp. presents results for the Oncodetect MRD Test in Early Triple-Negative Breast Cancer at SABCS; collaboration with NSABP Foundation & GBG; predicts distant recurrence post-surgery.
data.description: Exact Sciences Corp., a prominent cancer screening and diagnostic test provider, revealed the initial findings from its Oncodetect® MRD test for breast cancer. The study conducted in conjunction with NSABP Foundation and GBG showed promising results. The NSABP B-59 substudy highlighted the test's ability to accurately anticipate distant recurrence post-surgery in early-stage breast cancer patients. This significant development showcases the potential of the Oncodetect test in improving patient outcomes and monitoring disease progression.

data.title: Broadcom stock wavers despite beating Q4 estimates and raising guidance. Late fluctuations noted.
data.description: Broadcom exceeded expectations for its fiscal fourth quarter and provided positive guidance for the upcoming period. Despite this, Broadcom's stock showed fluctuation towards the end of the trading day. The post emphasizes how Broadcom's performance was better than anticipated, leading to investor interest.

data.title: Netskope exceeded Q3 revenue estimates, with guidance slightly above expectations, resulting in a smaller-than-expected loss.
data.description: Netskope's third-quarter revenue exceeded Wall Street estimates, and its guidance came in slightly higher than expected. The company reported a smaller-than-expected loss. This news comes as a positive development for investors and analysts following Netskope's performance in the recent quarter.

data.title: Becker Milk Company Ltd reports financial results for six months ended Oct 31, 2025 on TSX-BEK.B.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Toronto, the Becker Milk Company Limited announced its financial results for the six-month period concluding on October 31, 2025. The company, listed as TSX-BEK.B, expressed satisfaction with its performance during this period.

data.title: Cal Water approved to acquire Palm Mutual Water Company by CPUC. Ensures water service to Palm Mutual customers.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in San Jose, California, California Water Service (Cal Water) achieved a significant milestone by obtaining approval from the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) for its acquisition of Palm Mutual Water company (Palm Mutual). This acquisition is a strategic move towards ensuring the consistent delivery of secure and dependable water services to Palm Mutual's customers in the long run. Cal Water, a key subsidiary of California Water Service Group (NYSE: CWT), is at the forefront of this initiative.

data.title: ASH 2025 reveals paradigm-shifting data for multiple myeloma treatment landscape with major pharma developers presenting unprecedented results.
data.description: The recent ASH Annual Meeting and Exposition has captured the attention of the oncology community with a set of groundbreaking late-breaking presentations that are being described as unparalleled. Notable pharmaceutical companies like Johnson & Johnson, Arcellx, Gilead, Bristol Myers Squibb, Regeneron, AbbVie, and CellCentric were among the key players involved in these presentations. The event has drawn significant interest and discussion within the industry, with attendance and participation from a vast number of experts and professionals from the field.

data.title: New browser by Google pledges to revolutionize web browsing by eliminating tab clutter. #innovation #technology
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This decrease signifies a positive trend in the job market, with over 500,000 new jobs being added in the last quarter alone. Additionally, average hourly wages have seen a 3% increase, indicating potential growth in consumer spending. Economists are optimistic about these findings and predict further improvements in the coming months.

data.title: Cycle Pharmaceuticals is acquiring Applied Therapeutics and its lead drug candidate, govorestat, a CNS penetrant Aldose Reductase Inhibitor for rare metabolic diseases.
data.description: Applied Therapeutic's primary drug candidate, govorestat, is a groundbreaking Aldose Reductase Inhibitor specifically designed to target central nervous system rare metabolic diseases. This innovative drug is aimed at providing treatment for these rare conditions by penetrating the CNS effectively.

data.title: DTCC's subsidiary, The Depository Trust Company (DTC), receives No-Action Letter (NAL) from SEC to offer tokenization service.
data.description: In a significant development to promote digital asset usage, The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) disclosed that its subsidiary, The Depository Trust Company (DTC), has obtained a No-Action Letter (NAL) from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This letter allows them to introduce a new service under federal securities laws. The DTCC serves as the essential post-trade market infrastructure for the global financial sector, operating in major financial hubs such as New York, London, Hong Kong, Singapore, and Sydney. This initiative is aimed at advancing digital asset adoption in the financial industry.

data.title: 25 alumni from L.A. Film School influence 16 Golden Globe-nominated projects, showcasing school's impact on entertainment industry.
data.description: 25 alumni of The Los Angeles Film School are involved in a total of 16 projects that have been nominated for awards. This indicates the significant influence the school has on shaping the future of entertainment professionals. This news comes just before the start of Award Season, with the 83rd Golden Globes being the first major event.

data.title: InsCorp, Inc. has reported loan fraud impacting INSBANK, may cause adverse effects on company.
data.description: Today, InsCorp, Inc. disclosed an incident of loan fraud against INSBANK in Nashville, Tennessee. The company, listed as OTCQX: IBTN, remains in a strong position to withstand the impact of this fraud while ensuring sustained growth. The extent of the fraudulent activities and their effect on the company's operations are yet to be fully determined.
